text.title: Egress Cost Hidden Budget Guide Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-90d-cost-data
step.action: Sum egress + NAT-GW + cross-AZ. List sources.

step.name: attribute-to-features
step.action: Trace each source to a feature. Reject 'platform overhead'.

step.name: model-worst-case
step.action: Multiply by peak_multiplier (4x default). Compute cost.
step.note: Gate: If projection exceeds revenue margin, STOP — design CDN/endpoint mitigations.

step.name: set-budgets-and-alerts
step.action: Per region cap + alert at 80% + freeze at 100%.

step.name: review-nat-alternatives
step.action: Evaluate VPC endpoints / NAT instance. Estimate savings. Open PR.
